name: requirements_template
description: Generate a standard BA artifact template structure. Returns a pre-formatted template for the requested artifact type (use case, BRD, stakeholder register, etc.) with section headings and guidance notes. The calling agent then fills in the content.

artifact_type.description: Type of BA artifact template to generate

project_name.description: Project or initiative name to pre-fill in the template

sections.description: List of section names in the template

guidance.description: Brief guidance note on how to use the template
